summary: Smart Search & Supplier Intelligence Layer (Iteration 83) - Complete testing of all 8 intelligence API endpoints and frontend UI components. All 34 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend UI verified: Smart Suggestions panel with 3 cards (recent searches, popular destinations, supplier recommendations), KPI Analytics Dashboard with 6 metric cards, conversion funnel, daily stats chart, 3 tabs, time filter, and refresh button.
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 intelligence endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
GET /api/intelligence/suggestions returns recent_searches, popular_destinations, and supplier_recommendations correctly
GET /api/intelligence/funnel returns all 5 event types with conversion rates
GET /api/intelligence/daily-stats returns daily search/booking counts for chart
GET /api/intelligence/supplier-scores returns weighted performance scores with all 5 components
GET /api/intelligence/supplier-recommendations returns 3 categories (best_price, fastest_confirmation, most_reliable)
GET /api/intelligence/supplier-revenue returns revenue per supplier from booking_confirm events
POST /api/intelligence/track successfully persists result_view_event, supplier_select_event, booking_start_event
GET /api/intelligence/kpi-summary returns aggregated KPI with funnel data
Search analytics integration: POST /api/unified-booking/search creates search_event and updates recent_searches
Frontend Smart Suggestions panel displays all 3 cards with correct data
Recent searches and popular destinations are clickable and trigger searches
Supplier recommendations show 3 categories with supplier badges
KPI Dashboard shows 6 metric cards: Toplam Arama, Toplam Rezervasyon, Donusum Orani, Toplam Gelir, Basari Orani, Fallback Orani
Conversion funnel displays 5 steps with drop-off percentages
Time filter (Son 7/30/90 gun) works correctly
Refresh button reloads data successfully
3 tabs work: Genel Bakis, Supplier Performans, Gelir
Navigation: 'Coklu Supplier Arama' in agency sidebar under B2B section
Navigation: 'KPI & Analitik' in admin sidebar under SISTEM YONETIMI section

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render and interact correctly)

test_credentials: Agency Admin: agency1@demo.test / agency123, Super Admin: agent@acenta.test / agent123
seed_data_creation: Search tests created analytics events and updated recent_searches/destination_popularity collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intelligence Layer (iteration 83) fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Smart Suggestions API returns recent searches, popular destinations, and 3 supplier recommendations (best_price, fastest_confirmation, most_reliable), 2) Conversion funnel tracks 5 event types with rates, 3) KPI Summary aggregates all metrics, 4) Frontend Smart Suggestions panel clickable, 5) KPI Dashboard has 6 cards, funnel chart, daily stats, 3 tabs, time filter. All intelligence endpoints require auth. Supplier scores return defaults when no audit data exists.
